🧬 RNA Structure Graph Visualizations

Interactive network visualization of RNA secondary structures

📌 How to Interact

🖱️ Drag: Pan the view

🔍 Scroll: Zoom in/out

👆 Hover: See nucleotide details

🎨 Colors: A=Red, C=Cyan, G=Yellow, U=Green

📊 Edges: Gray=Backbone, Blue Dashed=Base Pairing
